# CWE-552: uploaded documents stored with world-readable permissions.
lang: go
file: CWE-552-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func SaveContract(c *gin.Context) {
	file, err := c.FormFile("contract")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	dest := filepath.Join("/srv/contracts", file.Filename)
	if err := c.SaveUploadedFile(file, dest); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, err.Error())
		return
	}
	_ = os.Chmod(dest, 0o777)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
